We have taken only a few examples to illustrate how the
symbolic Directions work.
1,3. Mars as the lord of the ninth (hips) is square to MC;
and on May 17, 1933 he was hospitalised. Thirty years later
he redeemed the pledge. These were in Rahu-Guru-Budha (6-
8 relation) and in Guru-Rahu-Ravi. The square was unfavour
able to Mars.

122 Rectification of Birth Time
2. There was a serious set-back in his aim to get the
highest degree. 1t was in Guru-Budha-Chandra and Kuja.
4. This period gave him an important footing in his carrer.
1t was in Guru-Guru-Guru.
5, 6. These offered important improvements in his carrer.
They coincide with Guru-Budha-Budha-Rahu and Budha
Shukra-Budha. The trine and sextile were favourable.
